Level of education.Description: Educational level achieved by the participant

Years of education.Description: Total number of years completed in the formal education system

School dropout.Description: Indicate whether the participant dropped out of school before completing the corresponding educational level

Gang member.Description: Indicate whether the participant has belonged or belongs to a gang or organized criminal group

Domestic violence.Description: Record whether the participant has experienced or committed violence in the family environment

Displaced by violence.Description: Indicate whether the participant or their family were forced to move due to internal armed conflict, violence or threats

Socioeconomic stratum.Description: Socioeconomic classification of the participant's household (example, in Colombia residential properties are classified on a scale of 1 to 6)

Type of crime 1.Description: Category 1 of crimes committed by the participant

Levels.Illegal_Carrying_of_Weapons/Narcotics: Illegal carrying of weapons and narcotics
Levels.Illegal_Possession_of_Weapons/Narcotics: Illegal possession of weapons and narcotics

Type of crime 2.Description: Category 2 of crimes committed by the participant

Levels.Carrying_of_Weapons/Narcotics_Violence: Carrying of weapons and narcotics violence
Levels.Illegal_Carrying_of_Weapons/Narcotics: Illegal carrying of weapons and narcotics
Levels.Illegal_Possession_of_Weapons/Narcotics: Illegal possession of weapons and narcotics

Type of crime 3.Description: Category 3 of crimes committed by the participant

Levels.Illegal_Possession_of_Weapons/Narcotics: Illegal possession of weapons and narcotics

Type of crime 4.Description: Category 4 of crimes committed by the participant

Recidivist.Description: Indicates whether the participant has reoffended after serving a previous sentence or sanction

Consumer of psychoactive substances.Description: Indicate whether the participant uses drugs or psychoactive substances

Alcohol.Description: Specify if the participant consumes alcoholic beverages

Marijuana.Description: Specify if the participant consumes marijuana

Cocaine.Description: Specify if the participant uses cocaine

Age of first use.Description: Age at which the participant first consumed any psychoactive substance or alcohol
